title: Inauguration of BVP OSA Student Chapter
subtitle: To establish the BVP OSA (Optical Society of America) Student Chapter at Bharati Vidyapeeth’s College of Engineering and create a platform for students interested in optics, photonics, and research-or
description: The BVP OSA Student Chapter was inaugurated in 2018 with the aim of promoting scientific learning and innovation in the field of optics and related technologies. The chapter marked the beginning of a structured student community focused on academic growth, technical exposure, and research opportunities.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Official inauguration and introduction of the student chapter
Faculty and student interaction regarding society goals
Establishment of the BVP OSA Student Chapter (later known as BVP OPTICA)
Beginning of a research-oriented student community in optics and photonics
Strong faculty mentorship and student involvement from the start
